text.title: Annual Roadmap vs Quarterly OKR Stitch Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: from trigger through validated artefact.

example.step: Trigger: preconditions in Applies-If hold; Skip-If clean.
Gather typed inputs per Prerequisites; cite each.
Register artefact; notify named reviewer for sign-off.
Trigger: one or more Skip-If conditions fire.
Decision tree routes to conclusion ref='skip-this-methodology'.
Document skip rationale with the matching rule reference; no artefact emitted.
